metadata.title: Frontend-leaning Full-stack · AI Agent Engineering
metadata.description: A frontend-leaning full-stack portfolio focused on React, Koa, LangChain, MCP, SSE, and AI Agent delivery.

hero.name: Cyrus
hero.title: Turning AI Agents into product-grade frontend experiences
hero.subtitle: I start from complex frontend systems and engineering practice, then extend into Koa.js, real-time communication, LangChain, Function Calling, and MCP. I can deliver an AI assistant end to end: interface, tool calls, context management, and production rollout.
hero.fallbackAnswer: Hi, I'm Cyrus's agent. He started in frontend, ships Tauri desktop and Node backends, and now mostly has me run his agent-engineering work — like TubePilot, a pipeline that moves YouTube to Bilibili. Mostly on domestic LLMs.

stats.label: First-token latency in the operations AI assistant

terminal.plan: ▸ [plan] Read alerts, logs, and knowledge context
terminal.tool: ▸ [tool] Call multiple tools through LangChain + Function Calling
terminal.observe: ▸ [observe] Unify model context through MCP and write back results
terminal.answer: ▸ [answer] Produce root-cause analysis, remediation advice, and readable result cards

agent.title: The point is not a chat box. It is an Agent inside a real workflow.
agent.summary: The AI assistant in the resume is not a demo. It covers frontend interaction, Koa backend services, SSE streaming, tool calling, log search, knowledge retrieval, prompt governance, staged rollout, and data cleaning pipelines.

capabilities.label: Agent orchestration
capabilities.text: Built a multi-tool Agent with LangChain and Function Calling, connecting monitoring APIs, log search tools, and knowledge-base retrieval to generate alert root-cause analysis and remediation advice.

capabilities.label: Context protocol
capabilities.text: Used MCP to manage multi-model context and support tool-call chains in multi-turn conversations, reducing the engineering complexity of model integration and context transfer.

capabilities.label: AI frontend UX
capabilities.text: Shipped a production AI assistant interface with SSE streaming, token-by-token rendering, Markdown and code highlighting, context actions, and tool-result cards.

capabilities.label: Prompt engineering
capabilities.text: Created prompt templates and a Few-shot example library, with versioning and staged rollout, stabilizing structured JSON parsing at 97%.

runtimeSteps.label: runtime step 1
runtimeSteps.text: After an alert enters the system, normalize logs, monitoring metrics, and knowledge-base matches into Agent-consumable context.

runtimeSteps.label: runtime step 2
runtimeSteps.text: LangChain decides the tool-call order, while Function Calling turns the intent into stable parameters.

runtimeSteps.label: runtime step 3
runtimeSteps.text: MCP synchronizes cross-model context, and the frontend renders tool results as readable, traceable, follow-up-ready cards.

runtimeSteps.label: runtime step 4
runtimeSteps.text: The final output includes root-cause analysis, remediation advice, structured JSON, and versioned staged rollout.

skills.title: Frontend is the edge. Full-stack is the delivery model.
skills.summary: This is not generic full-stack positioning. The foundation is complex frontend interaction, performance, and engineering, extended into Node.js services, real-time communication, AI tooling, and desktop-adjacent work.
skills.caption: Full-stack = able to take this machine apart and put it back together.

groups.title: Frontend frameworks and product UI
items: React 18 + TypeScript with Redux / Zustand, plus solid understanding of Fiber scheduling and Hooks patterns
Vue 2/3 with Pinia / VueRouter, Composition API, and reactivity internals
Next.js 13+, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui for maintainable product interfaces

groups.title: Complex components and visualization
items: React Flow and react-konva Canvas layered rendering for diagram and measurement interactions
Dynamic form engines, cross-field validation, Kanban boards, and drag sorting
Virtual lists, high-performance tables, and rich-text editor integration

groups.title: AI and real-time communication
items: LangChain Agent orchestration, Tool Calling, and multi-turn context management
MCP, Function Calling, prompt standards, and structured output governance
WebSocket heartbeat and reconnection, SSE streaming, and real-time task status sync

groups.title: Backend and engineering systems
items: Node.js / Koa.js middleware design, RESTful APIs, and JWT authentication
Vite / Webpack plugin development, build optimization, and code splitting
pnpm Monorepo, Jenkins CI/CD, ApiFox contracts, and private npm package releases

groups.title: Architecture and performance
items: qiankun micro-frontend decomposition, app communication, sandboxing, and independent deployment
Core Web Vitals governance, lazy loading, Tree-shaking, and long-task splitting
End-to-end delivery from requirement breakdown and architecture to implementation and launch verification

groups.title: Graphics and desktop-adjacent work
items: react-three-fiber / Three.js / vtk.js for medical model mesh parsing and interaction
Raycaster hit testing, BufferGeometry conversion, and model region coloring
Basic Electron packaging and process communication knowledge

projects.title: Resume projects reorganized around Agent delivery
projects.summary: AI Agent first, then complex frontend systems, design systems, graphics, and platform engineering.

items.title: A production multi-tool Agent with Koa + React
items.summary: Independently delivered the operations AI assistant end to end, covering UI, backend services, tool calls, context governance, prompt standards, and rollout mechanics.
bullets: Supported SSE streaming, Markdown and code highlighting, context actions, and tool-result cards, with first-token latency under 300ms
Integrated monitoring APIs, log search, and knowledge retrieval through LangChain + Function Calling, reducing alert diagnosis from 15 minutes to under 2 minutes
Used MCP for unified multi-model context; prompt templates and Few-shot examples brought structured JSON parsing to 97%
items.stack: React 18 / Redux / Zustand / TypeScript / Next.js / Koa.js / LangChain / MCP / SSE / WebSocket

items.title: Ticket workflows, admin console, and dynamic form engine
items.summary: Led the full medical ticket workflow and admin console, supporting differentiated permissions for doctors, technicians, and administrators.
bullets: Built strategy configuration, role permission management, audit-log search, and business dashboards
Designed a linked-list-style dynamic form engine to solve parent-child validation dependencies, shortening iteration cycles by about 40%
Built a shared design system and component library, packaged as private npm modules, reducing repeated code by about 30%
items.stack: Vue3 / Pinia / VueRouter / Element Plus / TypeScript / Vite / pnpm

items.eyebrow: PROJECT 03 · Cephalometric and Oral Model Systems
items.title: Canvas measurement engine and 3D medical model interaction
items.summary: Built graphics interaction capabilities for medical measurement and oral models, handling coordinate systems, measurement math, mesh parsing, and region selection.
bullets: Used react-konva Group layers to decouple image coordinates from measurement coordinates, fixing value drift during scaling
Abstracted measurement calculations into composable strategy-based math tools, allowing new measurement items without changing core logic
Parsed .vtp polygon meshes with vtk.js, converted them to BufferGeometry, and used Raycaster for accurate region coloring and lasso selection
items.stack: React / Redux / react-konva / react-three-fiber / Three.js / vtk.js / TypeScript / Vite

items.title: Micro-frontend refactor and CI/CD pipeline
items.summary: Led a qiankun micro-frontend refactor, splitting a tightly coupled SaaS monolith into independently deployed sub-applications.
bullets: Reduced new-feature release cycles from 2 weeks to 3 days
Built Jenkins + Docker CI/CD for automatic branch-merge builds and staged releases
Established API contract standards with ApiFox, improving frontend-backend collaboration efficiency by about 50%
items.stack: Vue2 / React / qiankun / React-Redux / Ant Design / ECharts / Jenkins / Docker

timeline.title: Current delivery record
timeline.summary: Current work at Yayan Medical, anchored by complex frontend delivery and a production AI assistant.

highlights.title: Reusable capability, not just project history
highlights.summary: These are the reasons I fit AI Agent productization: the frontend experience can be polished deeply, while backend and engineering delivery can still move independently.

items.title: Complex UI
items.text: Delivered Canvas / react-konva graphics, dynamic form engines, admin dashboards, virtual lists, and other high-complexity frontend modules.

items.title: AI interface
items.text: Shipped production AI assistant interaction covering streaming, Markdown and code blocks, tool-result cards, and multi-turn context actions.

items.title: Independent delivery
items.text: Delivered both frontend and backend for the operations AI assistant, covering requirements, architecture, implementation, launch, and acceptance.

items.title: Team leadership
items.text: Served as frontend technical manager for 2 years, leading micro-frontend refactoring, CI/CD, API documentation, technical planning, and code review.

items.title: Engineering
items.text: Led pnpm Monorepo management and private npm publishing, promoted Jenkins CI/CD and ApiFox contract standards, and improved FCP by 44%.

contact.title: If you need someone who can put Agents into business systems, start here.
contact.summary: B.S. from Wuhan University of Science and Technology. Currently frontend technical manager at Yayan Medical Technology.
